meta_description: Personal website of Anton Lechuga - science, running, music, and references.
study_text: I have an interdisciplinary background in social science and computer science. I am interested in the influence of current AI on society (positive and negative), and in how AI can be used to benefit society and enable humans rather than replace them.
work_text: My professional career is currently focused on cloud deployment and DevOps. My interest here is to ensure secure, stable deployments that are EU-law compliant and tailored to the customers' wishes.
life_text: I focus on AI and data science, spanning the full pipeline from organising and modelling client data to analysing it for insights or building models based on it. I have researched the robustness and explainability of deep-learning-based models across various domains.
quote_text: Enjoy the little detours to the fullest. Because that's where you'll find things more important than what you want!
running_text: After some break, I am currently concentrating on getting back to regular running (> 80 km weekly) and getting the best out of my body. I want to top my PBs, which I all set over the past two years.
music_text: Music is my passion, and I'm into all kinds of rock, metal and electronic music. I am experimenting with mixing techno, prog house and downtempo, and I am planning to try out making electronic-based music in combination with the flute and singing. Here are some of my current favourite albums:
friend_kristian_text: Anton is the single best thing ever happened to my life!
friend_tilman_text: Some people have study groups. I had Anton.
friend_anton_text: I would recommend everyone to work with or talk to him!
